finding_results.notes: Paul now leaves RT sealed for a concrete, scene-specific reason: the will has named a personal representative, the safe has already been disturbed, and opening a sealed estate envelope alone while newly jealous would contaminate both the record and his reading of it. The later beat reiterates that he needs a witness and cleaner emotional footing, not just abstract professional reluctance.

The deduction run now pivots on one concrete remembered anomaly, Martin unilaterally moving the 2008 draft for Tommy, with brief contrast cases for Nate and Joel. The closing inference is pulled back to an earned hypothesis rather than a nearly solved theory.
The study re-entry now focuses on the changed condition of the print and the revealed safe instead of re-inventorying the desk, shelves, and room contents.
The opening no longer uses the prohibited occupational tag. Paul's procedural mindset is conveyed through task focus and death-paperwork behavior rather than explicit role re-establishment.
Retained a single loon image in the opening lake view and removed the later repetitions.

The hiding artwork is now the lake landscape print Martin's parents bought at a craft fair in Duluth in 1983, matching the established canonical version.

finding_results.notes: Reduced the repeated claim/coverage/disbursement frame around and after the will reveal. Key emotional turns now land through room objects, the desk chair, and the chainsaw memory, while Paul keeps a narrower procedural texture in the opening setup and safe-combination recall.

pass_summaries.summary: Rebuilt Chapter 11 around a cleaner causal spine: Paul finds the will, the Tommy bequest lands as both grief and insult, one concrete memory sharpens that insult into suspicion, and RT stays sealed for a defensible estate-and-witness reason rather than plot-only withholding. The revision also removes the repeated study inventory, drops the opening adjuster label, cuts loon recurrence, eliminates em-dash overuse, and restores the painting's continuity.

Thinned the chapter's stacked insurance lexicon and rerouted Paul's post-will jealousy and suspicion through Martin-specific memory, lake-house objects, and plainer diction without changing the chapter's state shift or Chapter 12 handoff.
